title: BEM-875 response options
objective:
Append to governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM875_PROTOCOL_V13_RESPONSE.md: 
Strategic options:
- Option A: strict Curator-only communication. Safest, but slower and overloads Curator.
- Option B: policy-governed shared channel with Curator oversight. Recommended balance.
- Option C: free contour-to-contour exchange. Fastest, but rejected for audit and safety risk.
No issue comments.
